description: Notification center: unread badges, list, mark read/unread, filter, clear read, persistent read state.

userStories.title: Add notification read-state persistence
userStories.description: As system, store read/unread state per user so notifications persist across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Database schema or storage adds read state for notifications
Existing notifications default to unread unless previously read

userStories.title: Show unread badge and open notification list
userStories.description: As user, see unread count badge and open list of notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: UI shows unread badge with correct count
Clicking badge opens notification list pane or page
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notifications read and unread
userStories.description: As user, mark individual notifications read or unread and persist change.
acceptanceCriteria: UI control toggles read/unread and updates backend
Backend persists read-state change and returns updated status

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As user, filter notifications to show All, Unread, or Read.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter options available and persist in UI
Filtering queries backend or filters client-side correctly
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As user, clear all notifications that are marked read to reduce clutter.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear-all action removes or archives read notifications and updates unread count
Action is confirmed and undoable within session if applicable
